base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of attract_screen_enter_initials — a ui (hud_readout) from 1981 galaga. 'ENTER YOUR INITIALS ?' hi-score entry — red prompt, SCORE/NAME column headers, cyan fill rows. Player cycles letters A-Z with joystick, fires to confirm. Selected letter flashes yellow (per sheet note). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 'ENTER YOUR INITIALS ?' hi-score entry — red prompt, SCORE/NAME column headers, cyan fill rows. Player cycles letters A-Z with joystick, fires to confirm. Selected letter flashes yellow (per sheet note)
